---
title: "Chapter 3: Natural Numbers, Integers, and Booleans"
author: "HoTT in Lean"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Overview

This document summarizes the functions defined in `chapter3.lean`.
Each entry includes the function name, its Lean signature, and a short description.

# Namespace `chapter3_naturals`

## Types

| Name | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `myN.one` | `myN` | Base constructor, representing 1 in this 1-based natural system. |
| `myN.succ` | `myN → myN` | Successor constructor for naturals. |

## Numeric Constants

| Function | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `_1` | `myN` | The number 1. |
| `_2` | `myN` | The number 2. |
| `_3` | `myN` | The number 3. |
| `_4` | `myN` | The number 4. |
| `_5` | `myN` | The number 5. |
| `_6` | `myN` | The number 6. |
| `_7` | `myN` | The number 7. |
| `_8` | `myN` | The number 8. |
| `_9` | `myN` | The number 9. |
| `_10` | `myN` | The number 10. |

## Function Summary

| Function | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `toStringMyN` | `myN → String` | Converts naturals to strings (`1` through `10`, and `>=11` fallback). |
| `myAdd` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Recursive addition on 1-based naturals. |
| `myMult` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Recursive multiplication via repeated addition. |
| `myExp` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Exponentiation via repeated multiplication. |
| `myMin` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Minimum of two naturals. |
| `myMax` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Maximum of two naturals. |
| `triangular_number` | `(a : myN) → myN` | Computes the triangular number of `a`. |
| `factorial` | `(a : myN) → myN` | Computes factorial recursively. |
| `binomial` | `(a b : myN) → myN` | Binomial coefficient recurrence (with 1-based limitation for `a < b`). |
| `binomial_v2` | `(a b : myN) [DecidableEq myN] → myN` | Alternative binomial using equality decisions and `myMin`. |
| `fibonacci` | `(n : myN) → myN` | Fibonacci numbers with base cases `F1 = 1`, `F2 = 1`. |
| `div2` | `(n : myN) → myN` | Integer division by 2 in the 1-based natural setting. |
| `dist` | `(m n : myN) → myN` | Distance-like recursive difference function on naturals. |

## Instances

| Name | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ToString myN` | `instance : ToString myN` | Uses `toStringMyN` for string rendering. |

# Namespace `chapter3_integers`

## Types and Constructors

| Name | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `myZ` | `Type` | Integer type encoded as `myN ⊕ (Unit ⊕ myN)`. |
| `Zneg` | `(n : myN) → myZ` | Builds a negative integer. |
| `Zpos` | `(n : myN) → myZ` | Builds a positive integer. |
| `Zzero` | `myZ` | Zero integer constructor. |
| `__0` | `myZ` | Alternative explicit zero term. |

## Function Summary

| Function | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `myNatToInt` | `(n : myN) → myZ` | Injects naturals into positive integers. |
| `negative` | `(n : myZ) → myZ` | Integer negation. |
| `showMyZ` | `(z : myZ) → String` | String view of integers (`-n`, `0`, `n`). |
| `predZ` | `(z : myZ) → myZ` | Integer predecessor operation. |
| `succZ` | `(z : myZ) → myZ` | Integer successor operation. |

## Instances

| Name | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `Coe myN myZ` | `instance : Coe myN myZ` | Coercion from naturals to integers via `myNatToInt`. |

# Namespace `chapter3_booleans`

## Types

| Name | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `myBool.myTrue` | `myBool` | Boolean true constructor. |
| `myBool.myFalse` | `myBool` | Boolean false constructor. |
| `myProd.mk` | `(x : P) → (y : Q) → myProd P Q` | Constructor for custom product type. |
| `myEquiv` | `(P Q : Type) → Type` | Type equivalence as a pair of maps `P → Q` and `Q → P`. |
| `myNegType` | `Type` | Negation type alias (`P → Empty`). |

## Function Summary

| Function | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `myNeg` | `(x : myBool) → myBool` | Boolean negation. |
| `myConj` | `(x y : myBool) → myBool` | Boolean conjunction (AND). |
| `myDisj` | `(x y : myBool) → myBool` | Boolean disjunction (OR). |
| `proj1` | `{P Q : Type} → (z : myProd P Q) → P` | First projection from `myProd`. |
| `proj2` | `{P Q : Type} → (z : myProd P Q) → Q` | Second projection from `myProd`. |
| `myProdFunc` | `{P Q R : Type} → (f : P → Q → R) → (myProd P Q → R)` | Converts curried binary function to product-input function. |
| `double_neg` | `P → myNegType (myNegType P)` | Introduction of double negation. |
| `double_contrapositive` | `(P → Q) → (myNegType (myNegType P) → myNegType (myNegType Q))` | Double-negation contrapositive transport across implication. |
| `double_contrapositive_ii` | `(P → myNegType (myNegType Q)) → (myNegType (myNegType P) → myNegType (myNegType Q))` | Variant of double-negation transport with a double-negated codomain. |
| `double_contrapositive_iii` | `myNegType (myNegType (myNegType (myNegType P) → P))` | Higher-order negation principle over a classical-style implication. |

# Notes

- This chapter uses 1-based naturals (`myN.one` is the smallest natural).
- Several constructions in the boolean namespace are logic/proof combinators over types.
